heading: Guidelines on the disclosure process for security vulnerabilities relating to information systems, including Internet of Things devices
label: 278g–3c Guidelines on the disclosure process for security vulnerabilities relating to information systems, including Internet of Things devices
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Internet of Things Cybersecurity Improvement Act of 2020, also known as the IoT Cybersecurity Improvement Act of 2020, and not as part of the National Institute of Standards and Technology Act which comprises this chapter.
DefinitionsFor definitions of terms used in this section, see .section 278g–3a of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a security vulnerability relating to information systems owned or controlled by an agency (including Internet of Things devices owned or controlled by an agency); and

children.label: B
children.text: the resolution of such security vulnerability; and

children.label: A
children.text: receiving information about a potential security vulnerability relating to the information system; and

children.label: B
children.text: disseminating information about the resolution of a security vulnerability relating to the information system.

to the maximum extent practicable, be aligned with industry best practices and Standards 29147 and 30111 of the International Standards Organization (or any successor standard) or any other appropriate, relevant, and widely-used standard;

children.label: A
children.text: receiving information about a potential security vulnerability relating to an information system owned or controlled by an agency (including an Internet of Things device); and

children.label: B
children.text: disseminating information about the resolution of a security vulnerability relating to an information system owned or controlled by an agency (including an Internet of Things device); and
be consistent with the policies and procedures produced under .section 659(m) of title 6

children.heading: Information items
children.label: c Information items
children.text: The guidelines published under subsection (a) shall include example content, on the information items that should be reported, coordinated, published, or received pursuant to this section by a contractor, or any subcontractor thereof at any tier, providing an information system (including Internet of Things device) to the Federal Government.

children.heading: Oversight
children.label: d Oversight
children.text: The Director of OMB shall oversee the implementation of the guidelines published under subsection (a).

children.heading: Operational and technical assistance
children.label: e Operational and technical assistance
children.text: The Secretary, in consultation with the Director of OMB, shall administer the implementation of the guidelines published under subsection (a) and provide operational and technical assistance in implementing such guidelines.
